step_rationale: Early AMI biomarker; STEMI risk and prognosis discrimination.
mechanism: Acetylglycine elevation identifies acute myocardial infarction and stratifies cardiac prognosis in acute coronary syndromes.

references.title: Metabolomics Analysis Identifies Differential Metabolites as Biomarkers for Acute Myocardial Infarction.
Metabolomics Study Revealing the Potential Risk and Predictive Value of Fragmented QRS for Acute Myocardial Infarction.
